title: sambucus nigra f. luteovariegata
intro: Sambucus nigra f. luteovariegata, also known as the yellow variegated elder, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Adoxaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Sambucus nigra f. luteovariegata include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including sinus infections and flu symptoms.
